description: Common failure patterns and suggested fixes for autonomous iteration

patterns.regex: Type mismatch: inferred type is (\w+) but (\w+) was expected

patterns.fix: Check test expectation or fix implementation

patterns.regex: NullPointerException|null cannot be cast to non-null
patterns.fix: Add null check or use safe call operator
Implement missing function $1 or add import
Add missing parameter $1 to function call
Change visibility of $1 from $2 to internal/public

patterns.regex: Suspend function '(\w+)' should be called only from a coroutine
patterns.fix: Wrap call in coroutine scope or make calling function suspend
Check route handler returns correct status code
Check JSON structure matches expected DTO
Increase timeout or check for blocking operations
Ensure service is running (Postgres/Redis in CI)

search-and-import.description: Search codebase for symbol definition and add import
steps: Find package declaration in matching file
Add import statement to failing file

analyze-types.description: Analyze type hierarchy and apply correct conversion
steps: If convertible, add explicit cast or conversion
If not, fix the source of wrong type

compare-expected-actual.description: Compare expected vs actual values to identify root cause
steps: Read the test to understand intent
Determine if test expectation is wrong or implementation is wrong
Add null check with ?. or ?: operator
Or fix the source to not produce null
